title: Review the daily classroom snapshot and open the current activity
description: Verifies that a teacher can review today’s classroom overview and launch the current day activity from the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the daily greeting and date are displayed
Verify the class summary and mood overview are displayed
Open the current day activity in Modo Aula
Verify the current day activity view is displayed

title: Mark classroom attendance for all students
description: Verify a teacher can review the student list and mark attendance for each student in the classroom.

steps.description: Navigate to /classroom
Review the student list
Mark each student as present or absent
Verify the attendance status is recorded for the classroom
Verify the classroom status summary is displayed

title: Take attendance and record a student reaction
description: Verifies that a classroom educator can mark class attendance, add a student behavior reaction, and confirm the classroom status updates.
category: Painel de gerenciamento de alunos e presença

steps.description: Navigate to /classroom
Mark class attendance
Record a behavioral reaction for a student
Verify the classroom status is updated
Verify the student reaction is displayed

title: Mark a dashboard focus item complete
description: Verifies that a teacher can complete a focus item from today’s dashboard and see it reflected as completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Add a focus item for today
Mark the focus item as completed
Verify the completed focus item is shown as done

title: Complete attendance and classroom status review flow
description: Verify a teacher can mark attendance, record a behavior reaction, and confirm the classroom status in one classroom management session.

steps.description: Navigate to /classroom
Review the student list
Mark the required attendance statuses
Register a behavior reaction for a student
Confirm the classroom status
Verify the classroom summary reflects the latest attendance and behavior updates
Verify the classroom status confirmation is displayed

title: Create a blank weekly plan for a selected week
description: Verifies that a teacher can choose a week, create a blank plan, edit daily planning details, and save it successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /planner
Select a week from the calendar
Create a new blank planning
Edit the daily objectives and focus items
Save the planning
Verify the saved weekly planning is displayed

title: Create an AI-assisted weekly plan and refine it before saving
description: Verifies that a teacher can generate a weekly plan with AI, review the suggested structure, make edits, and save the result.

steps.description: Navigate to /planner
Select a week from the calendar
Create a new planning with AI
Verify the suggested weekly structure is displayed
Edit the daily objectives and focus items
Save the planning
Verify the saved weekly planning is displayed

title: Generate and review a custom AI activity sheet
description: Verifies that a teacher can configure activity parameters, generate a personalized sheet, and review the result.

steps.description: Navigate to /activities
Select an age group
Enter a theme
Choose a cognitive difficulty
Mark one or more activity types
Generate with AI
Verify the generated activity sheet is displayed

title: Record a student behavior reaction
description: Verify a teacher can register a daily behavior reaction for an individual student and see it reflected in the classroom view.

steps.description: Navigate to /classroom
Review the student list
Register a behavior reaction for a student
Verify the student's behavior reaction is displayed
Verify the updated student record is shown in the classroom view

title: Add a new student profile and update an existing one
description: Verifies that a classroom coordinator can create a student profile and then edit an existing profile so the roster reflects the updated data.
category: Painel de gerenciamento de alunos e presença

steps.description: Navigate to /classroom
Add a new student profile
Edit an existing student profile
Verify the updated roster data is displayed

title: Create a complete classroom roster from scratch
description: Verify a teacher can add a new student and then edit that student so the roster contains the latest profile information.

steps.description: Navigate to /classroom
Open the add student form
Fill in the student details
Save the new student profile
Open the newly added student profile for editing
Update the student details
Save the profile changes
Verify the roster includes the new student with updated details
Verify the classroom list reflects the saved profile changes

title: Add a new student profile
description: Verify a teacher can add a new student profile and see the new student included in the roster.

steps.description: Navigate to /classroom
Open the add student form
Fill in the student details
Save the new student profile
Verify the new student appears in the roster
Verify the student profile is available in the classroom list

title: Edit an existing student profile
description: Verify a teacher can update an existing student profile and see the edited roster data reflected.

steps.description: Navigate to /classroom
Open an existing student profile for editing
Update the student details
Save the profile changes
Verify the updated student information is shown
Verify the roster reflects the edited profile

title: Open a planned activity to prefill activity generation
description: Verifies that a teacher can start from a saved planner item and see the activity generator prefilled with the linked theme and activity type.

steps.description: Navigate to /planner
Select a saved day or activity in the weekly view
Open the linked activity generation flow
Verify the activity generator opens with prefilled planning data

title: Print a generated activity sheet
description: Verifies that a teacher can print an already generated activity sheet from the activity generator.

steps.description: Navigate to /activities
Generate an activity sheet
Review the generated activity sheet
Print the activity sheet with illustrations
Verify the printable activity view is displayed

title: Record behavior for a selected student after reviewing the roster
description: Verify a teacher can choose a student from the roster, assign a behavior reaction, and see the behavior entry retained in the classroom view.

steps.description: Navigate to /classroom
Review the student list
Select a student from the roster
Register a behavior reaction for that student
Verify the selected student's behavior reaction is displayed
Verify the behavior entry is shown in the classroom view
